name: Razorbaby
description: "Razorbaby will land on your head, get rid of it by touching a Bounce Pad."
detail1: - After ## seconds Razorbaby will land on top of the players head. If the player doesn't hit a jumppad within ## seconds they will explode.
detail2: - Razorbaby is a chaos enemy and doesn't spawn in main game.
detail3: - Razorbaby is only obtained by a curse, and is a eviler curse
deathmsg: "Hey Victim, you know there was a Bounce Pad right next to you, right?"  "Random witnessed Victim get their body blown to pieces."  "Victim had their ears blown out"  "Victim just died. To a baby."
